title: Dekton Rapid Bar Clamp Professional-High Clamping Pressure| Quick-release Mechanism| Durable & Strong Grip| Abs Handle And Rotation Button| Converts From Clamp To Spreader In Seconds| 45kg Clamp Force
features: Suitable for general purpose, workshop, automotive, crafts and hobbies.
An essential part of your toolkit.
description: From the manufacturer Dekton products are manufactured to high quality standard. Dekton offer good value for money and several use features to improve the performance of our products. Our products are sourced with strict ethical and quality standards from around the world. Heavy duty steel frame. Nylon handle and ABS rotation button. 6inch - 330mm 45kg clamp force Aluminium alloy Dekton 6 Inch Rapid Bar Clamp Professional Tighten Pistol grip with clamp trigger; Quick release button Easy reverse jaw converts clamp by spreading clamp or stretching tool Soft pads provide superior grip and protect delicate finishes.
